name: Bug report

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / logs

If applicable, add screenshots and relevant logs (redact secrets).

## Environment

- SkyVirt KubeUI version: <!-- e.g. 1.0.0 -->
- Kubernetes distribution & version: <!-- e.g. k3s 1.29 -->
- Install method: <!-- Helm / binary / in-SkyVirtHCI -->
- Browser (for UI issues):

## Additional context

Anything else that might help us reproduce and fix it.
